\def\mc{\relax}
\def\gt{\relax}
\def\sc{\scshape}
\begin{document}
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt\%} \bf popgen.red
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt\%} \null
 We shall solve the equation
 $$
 \eqalign{
 {\partial u\over\partial t}
	&=a(x){\partial^2 u\over\partial x^2}
	+b(x){\partial u\over\partial x}
	+c(x) u\cr
	&={x(1-x)\over 2}{\partial^2 u\over\partial x^2}
	+b(x){\partial u\over\partial x}
	+c(x) u\cr
 }
 $$
 by using numerical-symbolic hybrid method established by K. Amano.
 This equation plays an important role in population genetics.
 \rm\mc 
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\hfill

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt\%} coefficients
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\textbf{procedure}{\tt\mc \ }sqrt{\tt\_}a(x);

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }sqrt(x*(1{\tt -}x)/2);

\noindent
\mbox{}\textbf{procedure}{\tt\mc \ }b(x);

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }1/2{\tt -}x;

\noindent
\mbox{}\textbf{procedure}{\tt\mc \ }c(x);

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }0;

\noindent
\mbox{}\hfill

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt\%} domain
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt\%} \null
 $$
 {\tt domain\_p(t,x)}=\cases{
	1 &if $(t,x)$ belongs to the domain\cr
	\cr
	0 &otherwise\cr
 }
 $$
 \rm\mc 
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\textbf{procedure}{\tt\mc \ }domain{\tt\_}p(t,x);

\noindent
\mbox{}\textbf{begin};

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }\textbf{on}{\tt\mc \ }rounded;

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }\textbf{if}{\tt\mc \ }t{\tt\mc \ }{\tt <}{\tt\mc \ }0{\tt\mc \ }\textbf{or}{\tt\mc \ }x{\tt\mc \ }{\tt <}{\tt\mc \ }0{\tt\mc \ }\textbf{or}{\tt\mc \ }x{\tt\mc \ }{\tt >}{\tt\mc \ }1{\tt\mc \ }\textbf{then}

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt <}{\tt <}

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }\textbf{off}{\tt\mc \ }rounded;

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }\textbf{return}{\tt\mc \ }0

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt >}{\tt >}

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }\textbf{else}

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt <}{\tt <}

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }\textbf{off}{\tt\mc \ }rounded;

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }\textbf{return}{\tt\mc \ }1

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt >}{\tt >}

\noindent
\mbox{}\textbf{end};

\noindent
\mbox{}\hfill

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt\%} numerical-symbolic hybrid method
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt\%} \ Key idea depends on the following formula:
 $$
 \eqalign{
 u(t,x)
 &={1\over6}\,u\bigl(t,x+\sqrt{a(x)}\,h\bigr)
	+{1\over6}\,u\bigl(t,x-\sqrt{a(x)}\,h\bigr)\cr
 &+{1\over3}\,u\bigl(t,x+b(x)h^2\bigr)
	+{1\over3}\,u(t-h^2,x)
	+{h^2\over3}\,c(x)u(t,x)
	+O(h^4)\ .\cr
 }
 $$
 \rm\mc 
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\textbf{procedure}{\tt\mc \ }hybrid{\tt\_}method(t,{\tt\mc \ }x,{\tt\mc \ }n);

\noindent
\mbox{}\textbf{begin};

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }list{\tt\_}in{\tt\mc \ }:={\tt\mc \ }{\tt\char'173}{\tt\char'173}1,{\tt\mc \ }t,{\tt\mc \ }x{\tt\char'175}{\tt\char'175};

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }list{\tt\_}tmp{\tt\mc \ }:={\tt\mc \ }{\tt\char'173}{\tt\char'175};

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }\textbf{while}{\tt\mc \ }n{\tt\mc \ }{\tt >}{\tt\mc \ }0{\tt\mc \ }\textbf{do}

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt <}{\tt <}

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }\textbf{while}{\tt\mc \ }length(list{\tt\_}in){\tt\mc \ }{\tt >}{\tt\mc \ }0{\tt\mc \ }\textbf{do}

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt <}{\tt <}

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }tmp{\tt\mc \ }:={\tt\mc \ }first(list{\tt\_}in);

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }q{\tt\mc \ }:={\tt\mc \ }first(tmp);

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }s{\tt\mc \ }:={\tt\mc \ }first(rest(tmp));

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }y{\tt\mc \ }:={\tt\mc \ }first(rest(rest(tmp)));

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }\textbf{if}{\tt\mc \ }domain{\tt\_}p(s,{\tt\mc \ }y){\tt\mc \ }\textbf{neq}{\tt\mc \ }0{\tt\mc \ }\textbf{then}

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt <}{\tt <}

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }list{\tt\_}tmp{\tt\mc \ }:={\tt\mc \ }cons({\tt\char'173}q/6,{\tt\mc \ }s,{\tt\mc \ }y+sqrt{\tt\_}a(y)*h{\tt\char'175},{\tt\mc \ }list{\tt\_}tmp);

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }list{\tt\_}tmp{\tt\mc \ }:={\tt\mc \ }cons({\tt\char'173}q/6,{\tt\mc \ }s,{\tt\mc \ }y{\tt -}sqrt{\tt\_}a(y)*h{\tt\char'175},{\tt\mc \ }list{\tt\_}tmp);

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }list{\tt\_}tmp{\tt\mc \ }:={\tt\mc \ }cons({\tt\char'173}q/3,{\tt\mc \ }s,{\tt\mc \ }y+b(y)*h**2{\tt\char'175},{\tt\mc \ }list{\tt\_}tmp);

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }list{\tt\_}tmp{\tt\mc \ }:={\tt\mc \ }cons({\tt\char'173}q/3,{\tt\mc \ }s{\tt -}h**2,{\tt\mc \ }y{\tt\char'175},{\tt\mc \ }list{\tt\_}tmp);

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }list{\tt\_}tmp{\tt\mc \ }:={\tt\mc \ }cons({\tt\char'173}h**2*c(y)/3,{\tt\mc \ }s,{\tt\mc \ }y{\tt\char'175},{\tt\mc \ }list{\tt\_}tmp)

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt >}{\tt >}

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }\textbf{else}

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }list{\tt\_}tmp{\tt\mc \ }:={\tt\mc \ }cons({\tt\char'173}q,{\tt\mc \ }s,{\tt\mc \ }y{\tt\char'175},{\tt\mc \ }list{\tt\_}tmp);

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }list{\tt\_}in{\tt\mc \ }:={\tt\mc \ }rest(list{\tt\_}in)

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt >}{\tt >};

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }list{\tt\_}in{\tt\mc \ }:={\tt\mc \ }list{\tt\_}tmp;

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }list{\tt\_}tmp{\tt\mc \ }:={\tt\mc \ }{\tt\char'173}{\tt\char'175};

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }n{\tt\mc \ }:={\tt\mc \ }n{\tt -}1

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt >}{\tt >};

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }\textbf{return}{\tt\mc \ }list{\tt\_}in

\noindent
\mbox{}\textbf{end};

\noindent
\mbox{}\hfill

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt\%} main module
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}h{\tt\mc \ }:={\tt\mc \ }0.1;

\noindent
\mbox{}hybrid{\tt\_}method(4,{\tt\mc \ }0.5,{\tt\mc \ }2);

\noindent
\mbox{}\hfill

\noindent
\mbox{}\textbf{end};

\noindent
\mbox{}\hfill

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt\%} Here we give a numerical example.
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt\%} \null
 $$
 \cases{
 \displaystyle{\partial u\over\partial t}={1\over4N}
 {\partial^2\over\partial x^2}\big(x(1-x)u\big)
	\qquad (0<t\le 4N,\ 0<x<1)\cr
 \cr
u(0,x)\sim\delta(x-0.5)\cr
 }
 $$
 \rm\mc 
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\hfill

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt\%} \special{epsfile=solution.eps hscale=0.7 vscale=0.7}
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\hfill

\rm\mc
